name: x402-xahau-facilitator
description: Reference x402 facilitator for the proposed exact-xahau scheme: /verify offline (signature-verified), /settle on Xahau (replay-protected, delivered_amount-checked). The payer's xahc guardrail Hook is the L1 spending authority.
//ioredis: OPTIONAL — only loaded for the shared/durable Redis replay store + limiter (set X402_REDIS_URL). The default in-memory path runs with ZERO extra deps. Declared as an optionalDependency so `npm install` never fails on a platform that can't build it, and as an optional peer so it is never silently required.
